notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.lead: The piece you're looking for may have returned to the studio drawer.

home.heroLead: Each piece is hand-textured and stone-set in Vilnius — slow studio practice, no two alike.
home.catLead: A working index of pieces currently held in the studio drawer. Some are unique, some are made to order. Write to us for any of them.
home.atelierTitle: The hand that makes the stone speak.
home.atelierText: For twenty years Rima has cast and chased her own pieces — granulated surfaces, sapphires from the studio drawer, rose-gold bezels turned warm by hand.

catalogue.empty: No pieces in this category yet.

about.p1: Rima Berg has been working with silver for two decades — first apprenticed at the Lithuanian Art Academy, then in her own studio on Vilniaus street since 2008. Each piece is hand-cast, textured with her own tools, and stone-set one at a time.
about.p2: No collection is reproduced. When a piece sells, the maquette goes back into the drawer. What we keep is the language — granulation, rose-gold bezels, sapphires the colour of Vilnius rain.
